confirmed.title: Confirmable trait setters documented as modalSubmitLabel/modalCancelLabel but the real methods are modalSubmitButtonLabel/modalCancelButtonLabel
confirmed.evidence: The API reference lists the Confirmable trait setters as `modalSubmitLabel` and `modalCancelLabel`. In the source, packages/actions/src/Concerns/Confirmable.php defines the fluent setters as `public function modalSubmitButtonLabel(string $label): static` (line 97) and `public function modalCancelButtonLabel(string $label): static` (line 104). No `modalSubmitLabel` or `modalCancelLabel` method exists anywhere in packages/actions/src (grep confirms only the internal properties $modalSubmitButtonLabel/$modalCancelButtonLabel and the toArray keys 'submitLabel'/'cancelLabel'). Calling the documented `->modalSubmitLabel(...)` would raise an undefined-method fatal error. The same wrong names are mirrored in pt-BR/reference/php/actions.md and es/reference/php/actions.md.
confirmed.fix: Rename the two setters in the doc table (all three language mirrors) from `modalSubmitLabel`, `modalCancelLabel` to `modalSubmitButtonLabel`, `modalCancelButtonLabel` to match Confirmable.php.

verdict.reason: CONFIRMED and NEW. apps/docs/reference/php/actions.md:32 lists the Confirmable trait setters as `modalSubmitLabel`, `modalCancelLabel`. The source packages/actions/src/Concerns/Confirmable.php defines the real fluent setters as `public function modalSubmitButtonLabel(string $label): static` (line 97) and `public function modalCancelButtonLabel(string $label): static` (line 104); grep confirms NO `modalSubmitLabel`/`modalCancelLabel` methods exist anywhere in packages/actions/src (only internal props $modalSubmitButtonLabel/$modalCancelButtonLabel and toArray keys 'submitLabel'/'cancelLabel'). Calling `->modalSubmitLabel(...)` would raise an undefined-method fatal error. The same wrong names are mirrored at pt-BR/reference/php/actions.md:32 and es/reference/php/actions.md:32. The `actions` package is explicitly listed as previously-unswept; no SWEPT family covers this file+line. Fix: rename to `modalSubmitButtonLabel`/`modalCancelButtonLabel` in all three language mirrors.

confirmed.title: Action base setters visible()/disabled() documented as accepting bool|Closure but source accepts only Closure
confirmed.evidence: The reference documents `visible(bool|Closure), disabled(bool|Closure), hidden(bool|Closure)`. In packages/actions/src/Action.php the signatures are `public function visible(Closure $callback): static` (line 148) and `public function disabled(Closure $callback): static` (line 155) — they accept ONLY a Closure, not a bool. (Only `hidden(bool $hidden = true)` at line 162 actually takes a bool.) Passing a bool to `visible()`/`disabled()` as the doc suggests would throw a TypeError.
confirmed.fix: Change the doc to `visible(Closure), disabled(Closure), hidden(bool|Closure)` to reflect that only hidden() accepts a bool; visible/disabled require a Closure.

verdict.reason: CONFIRMED NEW contradiction in the previously-unswept `actions` package. apps/docs/reference/php/actions.md:23 documents the base setters as `visible(bool|Closure), disabled(bool|Closure), hidden(bool|Closure)`. But packages/actions/src/Action.php declares `public function visible(Closure $callback): static` (line 148) and `public function disabled(Closure $callback): static` (line 155) — both accept ONLY a Closure, not a bool. Passing a bool (as the doc advertises) throws a TypeError. Conversely `hidden(bool $hidden = true)` (line 162) accepts ONLY a bool, so the doc's `hidden(bool|Closure)` is also wrong (no Closure). The SWEPT ledger's action-setter entries (R1-R12) cover different, specific methods (DateColumn/BadgeColumn/etc. and column signatures), not this Action base visible/disabled/hidden line — this is a distinct, never-touched file+line. Recommended fix: `visible(Closure), disabled(Closure), hidden(bool)` — note the proposed fix in the finding is slightly off (it keeps `hidden(bool|Closure)`), but the documented contradiction is real and actionable.

The extraction is complete and wired.
confirmed.fix: Remove the FIELDS-015..018 concerns bullet (line 33) from the 'Ainda por chegar' section, or move it to a 'Delivered'/Status list; the four concerns are shipped and consumed by Field.php.

verdict.reason: CONFIRMED and NEW. packages/fields/SKILL.md line 33 lists `Arqel\Fields\Concerns\HasValidation`/`HasVisibility`/`HasDependencies`/`HasAuthorization` (FIELDS-015..018) under the "Ainda por chegar" (still to arrive / unshipped) section. All four trait files exist in packages/fields/src/Concerns/ (HasAuthorization.php, HasDependencies.php, HasValidation.php, HasVisibility.php). This is a distinct file+line (packages/fields/SKILL.md:33) not covered by any SWEPT family — the R10/R12 "Por chegar"/"Ainda por chegar" sweeps were for packages/widgets/SKILL.md and packages/ai/SKILL.md, not the fields package. confirmed.title: SKILL.md 'Ainda por chegar' lists FIELDS-019 automatic eager loading as unshipped, but EagerLoadingResolver exists
confirmed.evidence: Line 34 declares 'Eager loading automático (FIELDS-019)' as still 'Ainda por chegar'. Reality: packages/fields/src/EagerLoadingResolver.php exists as a `final class EagerLoadingResolver` that inspects BelongsToField/HasManyField and returns deduplicated relation names for Builder::with(...). The resolver is delivered (only the CORE-006 auto-wire into index() is noted as a separate follow-up inside the class docblock).
confirmed.fix: Update line 34 to reflect that EagerLoadingResolver is shipped; if anything remains pending it is only the controller auto-wiring (CORE-006), not the resolver itself.

verdict.reason: CONFIRMED and NEW. packages/fields/SKILL.md:34 lists "Eager loading automático (FIELDS-019)" under the "Ainda por chegar" (still-unshipped) heading. But packages/fields/src/EagerLoadingResolver.php is a fully-implemented `final class EagerLoadingResolver` with a working, tested public static `resolve()` method that inspects BelongsToField/HasManyField and returns a deduplicated list of relation names for Builder::with(...). It is covered by a dedicated tests/Unit/EagerLoadingResolverTest.php. The class docblock explicitly states only the CORE-006 controller auto-wire into index() remains ("for now apps can call it manually inside indexQuery()"), so the resolver itself is delivered — contradicting the flat "Ainda por chegar" claim. Not covered by any swept family: the swept fields items are apps/docs reference setter signatures and the FIELDS-020/021 search/upload endpoints, not FIELDS-019 eager loading or the SKILL.md "Ainda por chegar" list. Proposed fix stands: move FIELDS-019 out of "Ainda por chegar" and note only the CORE-006 controller auto-wiring remains pending. File: /home/diogo/PhpstormProjects/arqel/packages/fields/SKILL.md:34; source: /home/diogo/PhpstormProjects/arqel/packages/fields/src/EagerLoadingResolver.php.

confirmed.title: SKILL.md 'Ainda por chegar' lists FIELDS-022 macros + field registry runtime as unshipped, but FieldFactory macros are implemented
confirmed.evidence: Line 36 declares 'Macros + field registry runtime polish (FIELDS-022)' as still 'Ainda por chegar'. Reality: packages/fields/src/FieldFactory.php implements `macro(string $name, Closure)` (private static array $macros at line 37; __callStatic looks up macros first, line 44 `if (isset(self::$macros[$name]))`), and packages/fields/src/ArqelFields.php exposes `macros()` via `FieldFactory::getRegisteredMacros()`. The macro/registry capability is delivered.
confirmed.fix: Remove or reword the FIELDS-022 macros bullet on line 36; macros are implemented in FieldFactory. (Note: the FIELDS-021 `createOption` endpoint on line 35 IS still genuinely pending — no route exists in packages/fields/routes/arqel-fields.php — so leave that item.)

verdict.reason:
CONFIRMED — code-verified, NEW contradiction at packages/fields/SKILL.md:36. Line 36 lists "Macros + field registry runtime polish (FIELDS-022)" under the "Ainda por chegar" (still to come / unshipped) heading, but the entire FIELDS-022 scope is delivered:

1. Macro/registry runtime — packages/fields/src/FieldFactory.php implements `macro(string $name, Closure)` (private static array $macros, line 37; __callStatic checks macros first at line 44 `if (isset(self::$macros[$name]))`), plus `register()`, `hasMacro()`, `getRegisteredMacros()`, `flush()`.
2. The "skill helper" criterion — packages/fields/src/ArqelFields.php exposes `macros()` (line 44) delegating to `FieldFactory::getRegisteredMacros()`, and surfaces it via 'macros' => self::macros() (line 29).
3. The `arqel:field` scaffolder — packages/fields/src/Commands/MakeFieldCommand.php exists (signature 'arqel:field', line 20), generates the PHP Field class + TSX Input stub, and prints the FieldFactory::register() registration hint; it is registered in FieldServiceProvider.php (line 48). All FIELDS-022 acceptance criteria are met.

The qualifier "polish" does not rescue the doc: there is no unshipped remainder of FIELDS-022. 

This is a NEW file+line not covered by any prior SWEPT family — prior "Por chegar"/"Ainda por chegar" sweeps touched packages/widgets/SKILL.md (R12) and packages/ai/SKILL.md, never packages/fields/SKILL.md line 36.

Scope note (matches the proposed fix): the sibling line 35 "Endpoint createOption (FIELDS-021 slice restante)" IS genuinely still pending — grep of packages/fields/routes and src shows only a `createOptionUsing` closure setter on SelectField (SelectField.php:122), no HTTP endpoint/route. So the fix must remove/reword only line 36 and leave line 35 intact.

Proposed fix: remove or reword the "Macros + field registry runtime polish (FIELDS-022)" bullet on line 36 and move it to an "entregue/delivered" section, since macros, registry runtime, and the arqel:field scaffolder are all implemented.
